content_of_post_to_comment:
Just checked my browser and i have 47 tabs open 💀

The worst part is i genuinely thought i “needed” all of them. Started closing few and half were random articles, youtube videos and stuff i opened like 2 weeks ago and completely forgot about.

But whenever i try to close everything my brain goes “wait what if you need this later” lol

Please tell me im not the only one doing this. How many tabs you guys have open rn?
comment: The funny part is realizing the tabs are acting like a to-do list instead of a browser. I started bookmarking anything I wasn't going to read that day, and after a month I never opened 95% of those bookmarks either. Turns out my brain just wanted permission not to forget them.
